raise_justifications.desktop/macos/Desktop/Sources/Onboarding: Pinned swift-format normalizes line layout without changing this source's runtime behavior.

Adds a terminal-scan-state helper and failure status text so a failed or zero-file scan surfaces an error and Continue instead of a stuck spinner; onboarding adopts the async-arriving auth name, cancels the local file import task in deinit, and carries the sharpened goal/task prompts.
